raw_consumer_statement: I purchased a {$7100.00} wig from XXXX XXXX in XXXX of 2024 and still do not have the product. It was received with multiple issues. I disputed through Barclay Jet Blue and XXXX XXXX replied with incorrect info on which I reopened. I gave Jet Blue Barclays all the back up and pictures ( lengthy ) in which they clearly did not review. They said I was two days late to reopen the dispute and I informed them their representatives told me it would be reopened. It wasn't and they won't look into it further. They only accept documents via fax or XXXX  mail. I told them I faxed multiple times but their fax wasn't picking up. So my only choice was to mail. {$7100.00} later still no wig and almost a year into this. XXXX XXXX should be shut down.
